calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Vacated

Motion To Compel The Person Most Knowlegeable For Defendants General Motors, Llc
Off Calendar Jun-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter.

RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF SETH HARRIS' Motion To Compel The Person Most Knowlegeable For Defendants General Motors, LLC is granted in part and denied in part, as follows: The deposition of Defendant's PMK shall take place within the next thirty (30) calendar days. In the meantime, the parties are ordered to meet and confer on the topics and document requests included in the most recent notice of deposition. The request for sanctions is denied without prejudice.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2023 Set For Trial On Dec-18-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
